---
title: "Example"
author: "Inayat Gill"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Introduction

This is a simple quarto document demonstrating HTML output.

```{r}

# A basic R computation

library(palmerpenguins)
summary(penguins)

```

## Analysis


This section combines work from both branches. It provides summary table and mean calculation.

```{r}

summary(penguins$body_mass)

mean(penguins$body_mass, na.rm = TRUE)

```

## Visualization

The following plot shows the relationship between body mass and flipper length in the penguins dataset. 

```{r}
#| label: fig-plot
#| fig-caption: "Relationship between body mass and flipper length"

library(palmerpenguins)
plot(penguins$flipper_length_mm, penguins$body_mass_g,
     xlab = "Flipper Length (mm)",
     ylab = "Body Mass (g)",
     main = "Flipper Length vs Body Mass",
     col = as.factor(penguins$species),
     pch = 19)
legend("topleft", legend = levels(as.factor(penguins$species)),
       col = 1:3, pch = 19)
```
